changeSet.author: tanisha

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.triggers WHERE trigger_schema = 'public' AND trigger_name = 'trg_postgresql_customers_default_status'

changeSet.sql: CREATE TRIGGER trg_postgresql_customers_default_status BEFORE INSERT ON public.customers FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION public.fn_postgresql_customers_default_status();
